text:
巨♀~9地区 is the 11th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

"巨♀" combines the kanji for Titan (巨) with the alchemical symbol for woman (♀), referring to the Female Titan. The "9地区" part is read as "kuchiku", which, written with other kanji, means "extermination".

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-2:50), which is remixed to a higher tempo in 進撃st-hrn-gt-pf20130629巨人 (0:00-2:14), and the second part (2:50-5:15).
